text: humans have left 413,000 lb of material
on the moon in what is now known as the
toss Zone and the list of things that
make it up is pretty interesting there
are about 96 bags of human waste on the
moon which scientists intend to bring
back one day and see how its time on the
moon has affected it an Apollo 16
astronaut left behind a framed family
photo with a note on the back that says
this is the family of astronaut Charlie
Duke from planet Earth who landed on the
moon on April 20th 1972 there are six
American flags the ashes of Jean
Shoemaker an American geologist who stud
terrestrial craters and discovered a ton
of comets and planets with this poem on
his capsule a tiny Art Gallery a feather
and a hammer the Fallen astronaut a
tribute to all of the astronauts who
have died in the name of space
exploration Moon buggies golf balls and
an olive branch made of gold
